samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Frequency Divider for generating different clock frequencies based on the input clock signal.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Divides the input clock signal to generate different clock frequencies.</implementation>
    
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <signal id="cnt_10" width_description="[3:0]">Counter for generating CLK_10.</signal>
        <signal id="cnt_100" width_description="[6:0]">Counter for generating CLK_1.</signal>
        
        <always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST)>
            if(RST)
                begin
                    cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
                    cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
                end
            else
                begin
                    if(cnt_10 == 4'd4)
                        begin
                            CLK_10 <= ~CLK_10;
                            cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
                        end
                    else
                        cnt_10 <= cnt_10 + 1;
                    
                    if(cnt_100 == 7'd49)
                        begin
                            CLK_1 <= ~CLK_1;
                            cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
                        end
                    else
                        cnt_100 <= cnt_100 + 1;
                end
        </always>
        
        <always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST)>
            if(RST)
                CLK_50 <= 1'b0;
            else
                CLK_50 <= ~CLK_50;
        end
    </logic_description>
endmodule
